_doc: PSP × 3X-UI compatibility ranges for the v3.x PSP series. PSP pulls THIS file (docs/compat/v3.json) on demand from any v3.x build because it parses its own version, extracts major=3, and fetches the matching v<MAJOR>.json. Per-major split (v3.6.0-beta.7) keeps each file naturally bounded — when PSP ships v4.0, create v4.json and leave this file frozen. Inside one file, entries is an ordered list and matching is FIRST-MATCH-WINS, so put narrower / newer ranges earlier. Bumping max_tested_xui here ships PSP a wider tested range with zero PSP release. See docs/3xui-compat.md for the human procedure when validating a new 3X-UI release.

entries.notes: v3.6.2 migrated the 3X-UI client adapter to the first-class /clients/* API. HARD CUT: 3X-UI 3.2.0 removed the inbound-scoped per-client endpoints PSP used through v3.6.1, so v3.6.2+ requires 3X-UI >= 3.2.0 (min_xui floor unchanged). Tested range raised 3.2.0 -> 3.2.7: the whole API surface PSP touches is unchanged across 3.2.0-3.2.7 (every endpoint in adapters/xui/client.go still present), list still returns settings/streamSettings/sniffing as nested objects (flexJSON-compatible) and clientStats still carries email/up/down/total/lastOnline; 3.2.5's unique-subId enforcement is a non-issue because PSP never sets subId (panel auto-generates a unique one). Read path live-verified on a real 3.2.6 panel; /clients/* + inbound write contract is byte-identical to the 3.2.0 live-write baseline. 3.2.7 bump (2026-06-03) is SOURCE-VERIFIED (not yet live-panel): the 44-commit v3.2.6->v3.2.7 delta touches no endpoint PSP calls — web/controller/inbound.go is absent from the changeset (all 7 inbound routes byte-identical), client/server controller changes are purely additive (onlinesByNode, activeInbounds, getWebCertFiles) or doc-only, and the model.Client/ClientTraffic/Inbound structs are unchanged. 3.2.7 hashes API tokens at rest (SHA-256) but Match() hashes the presented bearer token and an ApiTokensHash upgrade migration rewrites existing rows in place, so PSP's stored plaintext bearer token keeps authenticating transparently. 3.2.8 bump (2026-06-05) is LIVE-PANEL VERIFIED on a real 3.2.8 panel (xray 26.6.1): inbound add/get/update/del + client add/get/update/del (all by panel-unique email) + bulkCreate/bulkDel + server/status + getPanelUpdateInfo all round-tripped, and /clients/get returns the unchanged {client:{uuid,email,enable,flow,password,auth,expiryTime,totalGB},inboundIds} shape PSP parses (new additive fields security/group/comment/createdAt/reverse are ignored). The v3.2.7->v3.2.8 delta is multi-node (3X-UI's own master/remote-node feature), client-bulk perf, and subscription-format work; the one client-API-touching change (#4892 'scope remote client update/delete to one inbound') is multi-node-specific and a no-op for standalone PSP, since PSP's per-(panel,inbound)-unique email maps each client to exactly one inbound — confirmed by live update+delete reflecting correctly. Narrower entry first (first-match-wins) so v3.6.2+ overrides the v3.6.0 baseline below.
v3.6.0/v3.6.1 baseline — verified against 3X-UI 3.1.0 (client ops on the inbound-scoped endpoints). Do NOT run these PSP versions against 3X-UI 3.2.0; upgrade PSP to v3.6.2 first.
